results.title: AMD Downgraded by Northland Capital Markets -- Rating Changed to Market Perform
Advanced Micro Devices Analyst Ratings and Price Targets | NASDAQ:AMD | Benzinga
This AMD Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Monday - Benzinga
SA analyst upgrades/downgrades: PLTR, AMD, MAT, PINS | Seeking Alpha
AMD Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026

summary: Northland Capital downgraded AMD to Market Perform (from Outperform) on April 27, PT $260 (cautious). DA Davidson upgraded to Buy, PT $375 (from $220). Susquehanna reiterated Buy, raised PT from $300 to $375. Envision Research upgraded to Buy citing agentic AI positioning. Overall Buy consensus from 34 analysts.
